description_long: This armchair features a rounded, barrel-shaped backrest that seamlessly curves into the armrests, creating a cocoon-like seating area. The upholstery is a soft, velvety fabric in a muted gray tone, giving it a plush and inviting appearance. A single matching cushion rests against the back, enhancing comfort and visual appeal. The seat is wide and slightly recessed, providing ample space for relaxation. The chair stands on four short, outward-curving legs with a metallic finish, adding a subtle touch of elegance. The overall design is modern yet cozy, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A plush, gray barrel-back armchair with velvety upholstery, a matching cushion, and metallic curved legs. Its rounded, enveloping form offers a modern and inviting look.
description_view_0: Side-rear view showing the continuous curve of the backrest and armrest, with the metallic legs partially visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide seat, matching cushion, and the enveloping barrel shape of the backrest and armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side-rear view, mirroring view 0, with the same curved back and visible metallic legs.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full rounded backrest and the subtle seam along the top edge, with all four legs visible at the base.
attribute_backrest_style: high, rounded, and continuous with armrests
attribute_upholstery_pattern: solid color with a soft, velvety texture
